title: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5: Security and Privacy Controls for Information Systems and Organizations - AC-1
authors: National Institute of Standards and Technology
abstract_text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 provides a catalog of security and privacy controls for information systems and organizations.

sections.title: AC-1 source section
sections.text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 places control AC-1 in the Access Control family. The control title for AC-1 is Access Control Policy and Procedures. This source section is limited to the named control, its family, and its title for deterministic hard-recall benchmarking.

sections.title: AU-4 distractor section
sections.text: A separate nearby control, AU-4, belongs to the Audit and Accountability family and is titled Audit Log Storage Capacity. It is included only as a distractor section for context packing.
